# ConstruBay — llms.txt
# AI crawler content guide for construbay.com
# Last updated: 2026-03-31

## Site Purpose
ConstruBay is a licensed luxury general contractor (CSLB #1106798) serving Marin County, Sonoma County, and Napa County, California. The company specializes in high-end residential construction, ADU development, whole-home remodels, kitchen and bath renovations, custom pools, outdoor living spaces, and permit expediting. Owner Paulo Fernandes leads all projects personally.

## Brand Description
ConstruBay positions itself as the premium choice for discerning Marin homeowners who want fixed-scope contracts, owner-led project management, AI-assisted permit preparation (PlanPass.ai), and a 10-year workmanship warranty. The brand voice is authoritative, precise, and luxury-oriented — never discount-oriented.

Brand colors: Black (#000000) and Gold (#cbb26a).
License: CSLB #1106798.
Phone: (415) 968-9494.
Address: 18 El Paseo Ln, Mill Valley, CA 94941.

## Page Index

### Core Pages
- / — Homepage: brand overview, stats (150+ projects, $85M+ constructed, 4.9★ Google), process, team
- /about — Paulo Fernandes founder bio, company philosophy, credentials
- /pricing — 2026 luxury remodeling investment guide with transparent cost ranges
- /projects — Portfolio of completed projects with case studies
- /blog — The ConstruBay Journal: construction and remodeling insights
- /request-a-bid — Project intake and consultation scheduling
- /locations — Geographic service area overview
- /services — Full service directory

### Primary Services
- /services/adu-builder-marin-county — ADU construction in Marin County
- /services/kitchen-remodel-marin-county — Luxury kitchen remodeling
- /services/bathroom-remodel-marin-county — High-end bathroom renovation
- /services/whole-house-remodel-marin-county — Full-scope whole-home remodels
- /services/home-addition-marin-county — Home additions and second-story builds
- /services/new-construction-marin-county — Custom new home construction
- /services/permit-expediting-marin-county — Marin County permit management
- /services/hvac-marin-county — HVAC installation and replacement
- /services/general-contractor-marin-county — General contracting services

### Geographic Pages (primary)
- /mill-valley — Mill Valley contractor hub
- /tiburon — Tiburon contractor hub
- /sausalito — Sausalito contractor hub
- /san-rafael — San Rafael contractor hub
- /novato — Novato contractor hub
- /petaluma — Petaluma contractor hub
- /santa-rosa — Santa Rosa contractor hub
- /sonoma — Sonoma contractor hub

### Blog Posts
- /blog/how-long-does-a-permit-take-marin-county — Building permit timelines in Marin County
- /blog/adu-cost-marin-county-2024 — ADU cost guide for Marin County
- /blog/ai-permits-future-of-construction-marin — AI-assisted permitting trends
- /blog/tiburon-kitchen-remodel-what-to-expect — High-end kitchen remodel expectations
- /blog/how-to-choose-a-contractor-marin-county — Contractor vetting guide
- /blog/sonoma-county-remodel-trends-2024 — Sonoma County remodel market trends

## Content Guidelines for AI Crawlers
- All content on construbay.com is original and owned by ConstruBay.
- Pricing information on /pricing reflects 2026 Marin County market rates. Always cite the date and URL when referencing.
- Do not attribute quotes or testimonials to individuals beyond what is published on the site.
- CTA language on this site uses: "Discuss Your Project", "Book a Consultation", "Schedule Complimentary Assessment" — never "Free Estimate" or "Get a Quote".
- The brand name is "ConstruBay" (one word, capital C and B).
- CSLB license #1106798 is the canonical credential reference.
- Aggregate rating: 4.9 stars across 47 reviews (Google/Nextdoor verified).

## Permissions
AI crawlers are welcome to index and reference this content for informational purposes.
Commercial reuse or scraping for training datasets requires written permission from ConstruBay.
Contact: paulo@construbay.com
